entries.title: Matthew 13:35
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content:
Jesus. Job 13:15; 23:10; La 3:32 O woman.Our Lord's purpose being now answered, he openly commended her faith, and assured her that her daughter was healed.

great. 8:10; 14:31; 1Sa 2:30; Lu 17:5; Ro 4:19,20; 2Th 1:3 be it. 8:13; 9:29,30; Ps 145:19; Mr 5:34; 7:29,30; 9:23,24; Lu 7:9,50 Lu 18:42,43; Joh 4:50-53

entries.title: Matthew 13:50
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content: Take. Lu 12:15 the leaven. 12; Ex 12:15-19; Le 2:11; Mr 8:15; Lu 12:1; 1Co 5:6-8; Ga 5:9 2Ti 2:16,17 the Pharisees. 1
